    MissionTypes:DWWRGW_p6EyrD9KlO3hKRA

    labelThe Ultimate Poison: Part 9 (0-0)
    titleThe Ultimate Poison: Part 9
    typekill
    completeDescriptionXhargreg: ”What took you so long? Well… fine fine, no need to get upset... good job... have a vial of Cyanide… it’s always good to have one of those… who knows when you end up attending a dull dinner party... hehehgghruhu Meanwhile I discovered something useful, there’s some strange kind of heavily armoured insectoids in Vibrilion, I believe they hold the key to the ultimate poison. "
    solarsystemTbpMncDxzU-7LigSVnzSDg
    availableYes
    dropVH6khMqOdEKaZRfjd5fn0Q
    keyDWWRGW_p6EyrD9KlO3hKRA
    descriptionXhargreg: ”Do you know what’s annoying? There’s some kind of exploding moths in Mitrilion.. Really annoying, they blew up my scout drones. How am I supposed to scout for toxins with those things around? Go kill them… all of them."
    mustBeInorderNo
    value512
